title: HubSpot CRM Object
description: Schema for a HubSpot CRM object record, applicable to contacts, companies, deals, tickets, and other CRM object types.

id.description: The unique identifier for the CRM object record assigned by HubSpot.

properties.description: The CRM object's properties as key-value pairs. Keys are property names and values are the property values as strings.

additionalProperties.description: A property value for the CRM object.

propertiesWithHistory.description: A map of property names to their historical values, including the current value and previous values with timestamps.

createdAt.description: The date and time the CRM object record was created in ISO 8601 format.

updatedAt.description: The date and time the CRM object record was last updated in ISO 8601 format.

archived.description: Whether the CRM object record has been archived (soft deleted). Archived records can be restored.

archivedAt.description: The date and time the CRM object record was archived, if applicable.

associations.description: Associations between this CRM object and other CRM objects, keyed by object type.

PropertyHistory.description: A historical value entry for a CRM property.

value.description: The value of the property at the given timestamp.

timestamp.description: The date and time when this property value was set.

sourceType.description: The source type that set this property value (e.g., CRM_UI, API, IMPORT).

sourceId.description: The source ID that set this property value.

Association.description: An association between two CRM object records.

id.description: The ID of the associated CRM object record.

type.description: The association type label describing the relationship.

AssociationCollection.description: A collection of associations to a specific object type.

Paging.description: Pagination information for a collection response.

next.description: Information for fetching the next page of results.

after.description: The cursor token to use in the 'after' parameter to get the next page.

link.description: A direct URL link to the next page of results.
